name: school-management-api
description: School Management API with Express and MySQL

scripts.build: node --check server/index.js && node --check server/db/connection.js && node --check server/routes/schoolRoutes.js && node --check server/controllers/schoolController.js && node --check server/services/schoolService.js && node --check server/middlewares/asyncHandler.js && node --check server/middlewares/errorHandler.js && node --check server/utils/appError.js && node --check server/validations/schoolValidation.js
scripts.docker:restart: docker compose down && docker compose up -d
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
